nasb.text: “Catch the foxes for us, The little foxes that are ruining the vineyards, While our vineyards are in blossom.”

esv.text: Catch the foxes for us, the little foxes that spoil the vineyards, for our vineyards are in blossom.”

cnv.text: 要為我們捉拿狐狸， 就是毀壞葡萄園的小狐狸， 因為我們的葡萄園正在開花。”

ccb.text: 为我们抓住那些狐狸， 抓住那些破坏葡萄园的小狐狸吧， 因为我们的葡萄树正在开花。
